coalitions: Central Asian Four regional-ownership bloc (KAZ-UZB-KGZ-TJK, steered by KGZ momentum)
China-Central Asia bilateral economic track built on the new BRI package
note: China's surprise BRI investment package, amplified by high mediator pressure, bought the Central Asian four a de-escalation framework and status-quo relief while conveniently keeping any comprehensive settlement off the table, leaving Russia and India sidelined amid the confrontational mood.
